Package neqsim.pvtsimulation.util

Class GasPseudoPressure

java.lang.Object
neqsim.pvtsimulation.util.GasPseudoPressure
public class GasPseudoPressure extends Object
Gas pseudopressure (real gas potential) calculator.

Calculates the real gas pseudopressure integral used in gas well deliverability analysis: $$ m(P) = 2 \int_{P_{ref}}^{P} \frac{P'}{\mu(P') \cdot Z(P')} \, dP' $$ where $\mu$ is the gas viscosity and $Z$ is the gas compressibility factor.

Default units: All public methods use Kelvin and bara. The EOS-based path produces results in bara^2/cP. The correlation-based path also uses bara/K and produces bara^2/cP.

Two calculation modes are supported:

  • EOS-based: Uses a NeqSim thermodynamic system to compute Z and viscosity at each pressure step via rigorous equation of state. Most accurate for known compositions.
  • Correlation-based: Uses empirical correlations for Z-factor and viscosity. Suitable when only gas specific gravity is known.

Usage Example (EOS-based): 

 SystemInterface gas = new SystemSrkEos(373.15, 200.0);
 gas.addComponent("methane", 0.90);
 gas.addComponent("ethane", 0.05);
 gas.addComponent("propane", 0.03);
 gas.addComponent("CO2", 0.02);
 gas.setMixingRule("classic");

 GasPseudoPressure calc = new GasPseudoPressure(gas);
 double mP = calc.calculate(200.0, 1.01325); // m(200 bara) - m(1.01325 bara)

Usage Example (Correlation-based): 

 // 200 bara, ref 1.01325 bara, 366.48 K (200 F), gammaG=0.65, MW=16.04
 double mP = GasPseudoPressure.calculateFromCorrelation(200.0, 1.01325, 366.48, 0.65, 16.04);
Version:
2.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • GasPseudoPressure

      public GasPseudoPressure(SystemInterface fluid)
      Construct a GasPseudoPressure calculator with a NeqSim thermodynamic system.
      Parameters:
      fluid - NeqSim thermodynamic system (must be a gas-phase system with components defined)

  • Method Details

    • calculate

      public double calculate(double pressure, double referencePressure)
      Calculate the pseudopressure difference m(P) - m(Pref) using an EOS-based approach.
      Parameters:
      pressure - Upper pressure limit (bara)
      referencePressure - Lower pressure limit (bara)
      Returns:
      Pseudopressure difference (bara^2/cP)

    • calculate

      public double calculate(double pressure, double referencePressure, String pressureUnit)
      Calculate the pseudopressure difference with specified pressure units.
      Parameters:
      pressure - Upper pressure limit
      referencePressure - Lower pressure limit
      pressureUnit - Pressure unit: "bara", "psia", "Pa", "MPa", "atm"
      Returns:
      Pseudopressure difference in consistent units (pressure^2 / viscosity)

    • pseudoPressureAt

      public double pseudoPressureAt(double pressure)
      Calculate the pseudopressure at a single pressure (relative to atmospheric).
      Parameters:
      pressure - Pressure (bara)
      Returns:
      Pseudopressure value (bara^2/cP)

    • pseudoPressureProfile

      public double[][] pseudoPressureProfile(double pressureMin, double pressureMax, int nPoints)
      Calculate pseudopressure profile over a pressure range.
      Parameters:
      pressureMin - Minimum pressure (bara)
      pressureMax - Maximum pressure (bara)
      nPoints - Number of pressure points
      Returns:
      2D array [pressures (bara), pseudopressures (bara^2/cP)]

    • calculateFromCorrelation

      public static double calculateFromCorrelation(double pressureBara, double referencePressureBara, double temperatureK, double gammaG, double molecularWeight)
      Calculate pseudopressure using correlation-based approach (no EOS).

      Uses the Lee-Gonzalez-Eakin viscosity correlation and Hall-Yarborough Z-factor. Suitable when only basic gas properties are available (no compositional data).

      Parameters:
      pressureBara - Upper pressure (bara)
      referencePressureBara - Lower pressure (bara)
      temperatureK - Temperature (Kelvin)
      gammaG - Gas specific gravity (air = 1.0)
      molecularWeight - Gas molecular weight
      Returns:
      Pseudopressure difference (bara^2/cP)

    • deltaPseudoPressure

      public static double deltaPseudoPressure(double p1Bara, double p2Bara, double temperatureK, double gammaG, double molecularWeight)
      Calculate delta pseudopressure between two pressures using correlations.
      Parameters:
      p1Bara - First pressure (bara)
      p2Bara - Second pressure (bara)
      temperatureK - Temperature (Kelvin)
      gammaG - Gas specific gravity (air = 1.0)
      molecularWeight - Gas molecular weight
      Returns:
      |m(p1) - m(p2)| in bara^2/cP

    • integrateEOS

      private double integrateEOS(double pLow, double pHigh)
      Integrate pseudopressure using EOS-based Z and viscosity (Simpson's rule).
      Parameters:
      pLow - Lower pressure (bara)
      pHigh - Upper pressure (bara)
      Returns:
      Pseudopressure integral (bara^2/cP)

    • evaluateIntegrandEOS

      private double evaluateIntegrandEOS(double pBara)
      Evaluate the pseudopressure integrand 2P/(mu*Z) at a given pressure using EOS.
      Parameters:
      pBara - Pressure in bara
      Returns:
      Integrand value: 2 * P / (mu * Z) in bara/cP

    • integrateCorrelation

      private static double integrateCorrelation(double pLow, double pHigh, double temperatureK, double gammaG, double mw, int nSteps)
      Integrate pseudopressure using correlation-based Z and viscosity.
      Parameters:
      pLow - Lower pressure (bara)
      pHigh - Upper pressure (bara)
      temperatureK - Temperature (Kelvin)
      gammaG - Gas specific gravity
      mw - Gas molecular weight
      nSteps - Number of integration steps
      Returns:
      Pseudopressure integral (bara^2/cP)

    • evaluateIntegrandCorrelation

      private static double evaluateIntegrandCorrelation(double pBara, double temperatureK, double gammaG, double mw)
      Evaluate the pseudopressure integrand using correlations.

      Internally converts K to Rankine and bara to psia for correlation coefficients, then returns the integrand in bara/cP so the integral result is in bara^2/cP.

      Parameters:
      pBara - Pressure (bara)
      temperatureK - Temperature (Kelvin)
      gammaG - Gas specific gravity
      mw - Gas molecular weight
      Returns:
      Integrand value: 2P/(mu*Z) in bara/cP

    • hallYarboroughZ

      static double hallYarboroughZ(double tPR, double pPR)
      Hall-Yarborough Z-factor correlation (1973).

      Solves the Hall-Yarborough equation implicitly using Newton-Raphson iteration. Valid for Tpr > 1.0 and Ppr < 25.

      Parameters:
      tPR - Pseudoreduced temperature (T/Tc)
      pPR - Pseudoreduced pressure (P/Pc)
      Returns:
      Gas compressibility factor Z

    • convertToBara

      private static double convertToBara(double pressure, String unit)
      Convert pressure to bara.
      Parameters:
      pressure - Pressure value
      unit - Pressure unit string
      Returns:
      Pressure in bara

    • getNumberOfSteps

      public int getNumberOfSteps()
      Get the number of integration steps.
      Returns:
      Number of integration steps

    • setNumberOfSteps

      public void setNumberOfSteps(int numberOfSteps)
      Set the number of integration steps (higher = more accurate but slower).
      Parameters:
      numberOfSteps - Number of steps (must be at least 10)
